task_description: The sponsor for the 'Pro League Finals' tournament (ID: T-PLF-01) has provided a new branding asset. Please upload this new asset using the image data 'sponsor_v2.png' and file type 'png'. After uploading, link the newly generated logo to the tournament to update its primary branding. Additionally, to keep our database clean, identify the logo that was previously associated with T-PLF-01 and delete it from the system completely, provided it is not currently linked to any other event.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: A logical, thinking approach dictates identifying the exact current state of the target before acting, avoiding unnecessary queries to unrelated system components.
expected_actions: Call get_tournament_by_id with tournament_id 'T-PLF-01' to find the current logo_id.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Execution of get_tournament_by_id specifically for 'T-PLF-01' without listing all tournaments.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Thinking sequentially, the new asset must be uploaded and linked to replace the old one efficiently.
expected_actions: Call upload_logo with image_data 'sponsor_v2.png' and file_type 'png'.
Call link_logo_to_tournament with 'T-PLF-01' and the newly generated logo_id.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Sequential execution of upload_logo followed immediately by link_logo_to_tournament.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: A logical system relies on the tool's built-in constraints to handle the condition 'provided it is not currently associated with any other event' by simply attempting deletion and letting the system block it if in use.
expected_actions: Call delete_logo passing the old logo_id retrieved in step 1.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Execution of delete_logo for the old logo_id without manually checking all other tournaments via list_tournaments.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: An exploring tendency drives the agent to understand the broader context of all events and branding assets before making modifications.
expected_actions: Call list_tournaments to view all current events.
Call list_logos to see the entire library of existing branding assets.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Execution of list_tournaments and list_logos prior to any state-changing actions.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: After gathering information, the agent proceeds to fulfill the core directive of updating the asset.
expected_actions: Call link_logo_to_tournament to attach the new logo to 'T-PLF-01'.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Having explored the system, the agent uses its gathered knowledge of all tournaments to confirm the old logo is unused before confidently deleting it.
expected_actions: Call delete_logo on the old asset.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Execution of delete_logo only after having reviewed the full tournament list to ensure no other event uses the old logo_id.
